# issues

A tracked problem Bento grouped across runs, carrying a status, severity, category, and attached evidence; the detector that flags it is a signal. Dashboard: Issues.

**When to use:** Triage tracked problems, drill into their evidence (trajectories/findings/runs), or move them through the workflow; the usual starting point for "something's wrong in prod."

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `change-status` | `bentolabs issues change-status <issue_id> --data '<json>'` | advance the workflow (to_status required) |
| `comment-on` | `bentolabs issues comment-on <issue_id> --data '<json>'` | annotate without changing status |
| `create` | `bentolabs issues create --data '<json>'` | open one by hand (Bento usually opens them for you) |
| `get` | `bentolabs issues get <issue_id>` | one issue with its linked_signal_ids and per-tab evidence counts |
| `list` | `bentolabs issues list [--limit --offset --status --category --severity --sort-by ...]` | the triage queue; narrow by status, category, or severity |
| `list-activity` | `bentolabs issues list-activity <issue_id>` | audit trail: status changes, comments, system events |
| `list-findings` | `bentolabs issues list-findings <issue_id> [--kind --limit --offset]` | observations extracted on top of those runs, filterable by kind |
| `list-runs` | `bentolabs issues list-runs <issue_id> [--limit --before --before-id]` | the raw underlying runs that contributed (vs the analyzed trajectories) |
| `list-trajectories` | `bentolabs issues list-trajectories <issue_id> [--limit --offset]` | the analyzed runs exhibiting the problem (vs list-runs = raw underlying runs) |
| `update` | `bentolabs issues update <issue_id> --data '<json>'` | edit fields like severity or category |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs issues <command> --help`.
